program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Negotiating the terms of the partnership with Sarah back in São Paulo -- proposals, offers and the polite proposal code (would + first conditional) -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 12 -- Negotiating & Agreeing
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 12 -- Negotiating & Agreeing

listenings.text: Hello Fernando, this is Sarah. I am calling about our partnership. I would like to send you a proposal this week. My offer is a two-year deal. I think the terms are fair for both sides. If you accept, we can sign very soon. Please call me back. Thank you.

Good news. Today I met Sarah to negotiate our deal. She made a fair proposal. At first, I could not accept the full price. So we found a compromise. Now I agree with the new terms. We will sign the deal next week. I am very happy.
